title: A Surprise Bonus
scenario: Your company hands you a ₹40,000 performance bonus. Your first instinct is a quick getaway. What do you actually do with it?

choices.label: Book a vacation
choices.lesson: Windfalls feel like 'free money', but spending all of it raises your lifestyle baseline. Enjoying part and saving part keeps you ahead.

choices.label: Top up the emergency fund
choices.lesson: A windfall is the easiest time to strengthen your safety net, because you weren't relying on that money anyway.
